title: turanecio lorentii
side_effects: Turanecio lorentii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, nausea, and headaches. In severe cases, it can cause liver damage, kidney problems, and even respiratory failure. Prolonged use without proper medical supervision can lead to hormonal imbalances, which may result in weight gain, mood swings, and insomnia. Additionally, improper preparation of the plant can also cause gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps.
